## Contribution Guidelines & Checklist
*Please check the boxes below if the conditions are met.*

- [ ] My code follows the formatting rules (Prettier/ESLint).
- [ ] I have exclusively used `--nds-` CSS variables (no hardcoded values).
- [ ] My modification is backward compatible with previous versions.
- [ ] I have added/updated the corresponding `.stories.svelte` file.
- [ ] I have written/updated the tests (unit/E2E).
- [ ] Documentation and comments are written in English.
- [ ] SVG icons use `currentColor` and respect the design language.
